notes: Dow is one of the world's largest materials science companies with a comprehensive portfolio of silicone-based ingredients for personal care. Their DOWSIL™ and XIAMETER® silicone ranges include film formers, sensory modifiers, and emollients that are used in virtually every category of personal care product. Dow's silicone elastomers are particularly valued for their ability to deliver a unique, cushiony skin feel and improve the spreadability of formulations. Dow also offers naturally derived silicone alternatives for formulators seeking sustainable options without compromising performance.

Dow is one of the world's largest materials science companies with a comprehensive portfolio of silicone-based ingredients for personal care. Their DOWSIL™ and XIAMETER® silicone ranges include film formers, sensory modifiers, and emollients that are used in virtually every category of personal care product. Dow's silicone elastomers are particularly valued for their ability to deliver a unique, cushiony skin feel and improve the spreadability of formulations.

Dow is one of the world's largest materials science companies with a comprehensive portfolio of silicone-based ingredients for personal care. Their DOWSIL™ and XIAMETER® silicone ranges include film formers, sensory modifiers, and emollients that are used in virtually every category of personal care product. Dow's silicone elastomers are particularly valued for their ability to deliver a unique, cushiony skin feel and improve the spreadability of formulations, making them indispensable in premium skincare and color cosmetics.
